news.title:
L&T Tech unveils AI-powered lung digital twin platform for diagnostics.
Platform utilizes NVIDIA technology to improve respiratory health solutions.
news.summary:
L&T Tech unveils AI-powered lung digital twin platform for diagnostics.
Platform utilizes NVIDIA technology to improve respiratory health solutions.

news.title:
L&T Technology Services clarified volume movement due to market-driven factors, no material event disclosed.
Company ensures corporate governance, transparency, and timely disclosures as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
L&T Technology Services clarified volume movement due to market-driven factors, no material event disclosed.
Company ensures corporate governance, transparency, and timely disclosures as per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
L&T Tech Services rebounded from a 52-week low, surging 13% despite Nifty 50 falling 2% and Sensex down 1,500 points.
Volumes hit a record 35 lakh shares, turnover ₹1,151.1 cr. Centrum retained 'Neutral' rating with a target price of ₹4,451.
news.summary:
L&T Tech Services rebounded from a 52-week low, surging 13% despite Nifty 50 falling 2% and Sensex down 1,500 points.
Volumes hit a record 35 lakh shares, turnover ₹1,151.1 cr. Centrum retained 'Neutral' rating with a target price of ₹4,451.

news.title:
LTTS plans to exit commoditised segments, focusing on high-value engineering and AI to drive margin-led growth.
Q3 FY26 net profit declined 8% QoQ to ₹303 crore. Sustainability is LTTS's fastest-growing, most profitable vertical.
news.summary:
LTTS plans to exit commoditised segments, focusing on high-value engineering and AI to drive margin-led growth.
Q3 FY26 net profit declined 8% QoQ to ₹303 crore. Sustainability is LTTS's fastest-growing, most profitable vertical.

news.title: L&T Technology Services aims to secure 500 AI patents in 12-18 months.
news.summary: L&T Technology Services aims to secure 500 AI patents in 12-18 months.

news.title:
L&T Technology Services announces participation in multiple investor meets in February 2026.
Scheduled events include conferences by Nuvama, Axis Capital, Kotak, and IIFL in Mumbai.
news.summary:
L&T Technology Services announces participation in multiple investor meets in February 2026.
Scheduled events include conferences by Nuvama, Axis Capital, Kotak, and IIFL in Mumbai.

news.title:
L&T's IT units, LTIMindtree and LTTS, are set to miss their growth targets for 2026 due to economic uncertainties, leadership churn, and a slow merger process.
While L&T's overall revenue may exceed targets, its IT divisions lag behind peers like KPIT and Tata Elxsi, with slower growth in key sectors like automotive.
news.summary:
L&T's IT units, LTIMindtree and LTTS, are set to miss their growth targets for 2026 due to economic uncertainties, leadership churn, and a slow merger process.
While L&T's overall revenue may exceed targets, its IT divisions lag behind peers like KPIT and Tata Elxsi, with slower growth in key sectors like automotive.

news.title:
LTTS secures a multi-year ER&D deal with a leading automotive OEM, enhancing its mobility segment.
The engagement covers software, cloud, cybersecurity, and mechanical engineering, showcasing LTTS's R&D prowess.
news.summary:
LTTS secures a multi-year ER&D deal with a leading automotive OEM, enhancing its mobility segment.
The engagement covers software, cloud, cybersecurity, and mechanical engineering, showcasing LTTS's R&D prowess.

news.title:
Sudip Banerjee ceases as Independent Director of L&T Tech Services after completing his second 5-year term.
The company appreciated his contributions and disclosed changes as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
Sudip Banerjee ceases as Independent Director of L&T Tech Services after completing his second 5-year term.
The company appreciated his contributions and disclosed changes as per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
L&T Tech Q3FY26 revenue declines 2.8% in constant currency.
The decline is attributed to business recalibration efforts.
news.summary:
L&T Tech Q3FY26 revenue declines 2.8% in constant currency.
The decline is attributed to business recalibration efforts.

news.title: HSBC maintains Hold rating on L&T Tech, lowers target to Rs 4745.
news.summary: HSBC maintains Hold rating on L&T Tech, lowers target to Rs 4745.

news.title:
L&T Tech reported flat Q3 mobility margins at 14.8% but expects better Q4 results.
The company has a strong yearly pipeline with deals over $100M and smaller ones worth $50M, $20M, and $10M.
news.summary:
L&T Tech reported flat Q3 mobility margins at 14.8% but expects better Q4 results.
The company has a strong yearly pipeline with deals over $100M and smaller ones worth $50M, $20M, and $10M.

news.title:
L&T Tech anticipates a 1% Q4 impact from wage hikes.
This is expected to be offset by margin gains via efficiency and portfolio selection.
news.summary:
L&T Tech anticipates a 1% Q4 impact from wage hikes.
This is expected to be offset by margin gains via efficiency and portfolio selection.

news.title:
L&T Tech forecasts a 26.5%-27% tax rate, better than last year.
The company targets reducing Days Sales Outstanding to 110-115 days.
news.summary:
L&T Tech forecasts a 26.5%-27% tax rate, better than last year.
The company targets reducing Days Sales Outstanding to 110-115 days.

news.title:
L&T Technology Services' market cap dropped ₹16b, affecting public companies holding 74% and institutions with 15%.
Larsen & Toubro owns 74% of LTTS; Life Insurance Corp and SBI Funds hold 6.9% and 1.8%, respectively.
news.summary:
L&T Technology Services' market cap dropped ₹16b, affecting public companies holding 74% and institutions with 15%.
Larsen & Toubro owns 74% of LTTS; Life Insurance Corp and SBI Funds hold 6.9% and 1.8%, respectively.

news.title:
L&T Tech's Q3 profit may rise 10-11% YoY, sales up 14-16%. Margins likely expand QoQ.
Brokerages project profit between Rs 340.6-355 crore and sales near Rs 3,033-3,093 crore.
news.summary:
L&T Tech's Q3 profit may rise 10-11% YoY, sales up 14-16%. Margins likely expand QoQ.
Brokerages project profit between Rs 340.6-355 crore and sales near Rs 3,033-3,093 crore.

news.title:
L&T Technology Services reports a one-time charge of ₹354M due to India's labour codes.
Q3 net profit at ₹3.03B missed IBES estimate of ₹3.38B; revenue at ₹29.24B.
news.summary:
L&T Technology Services reports a one-time charge of ₹354M due to India's labour codes.
Q3 net profit at ₹3.03B missed IBES estimate of ₹3.38B; revenue at ₹29.24B.

news.title:
HDFC Life, Jio Financial, L&T Tech among 27 firms set to announce Q3 FY26 results on Jan 15.
Other firms include Hathway Cable, Smartworks, and South India Paper Mills.
news.summary:
HDFC Life, Jio Financial, L&T Tech among 27 firms set to announce Q3 FY26 results on Jan 15.
Other firms include Hathway Cable, Smartworks, and South India Paper Mills.

news.title:
L&T Technology Services (LTTS) will release Q3 FY26 results on Jan 15, 2026.
An earnings call will follow at 7 PM IST; details available on LTTS website.
news.summary:
L&T Technology Services (LTTS) will release Q3 FY26 results on Jan 15, 2026.
An earnings call will follow at 7 PM IST; details available on LTTS website.

news.title:
L&T Technology Services partners with Palfinger to establish a Global Development Center.
The GDC aims to accelerate product development processes for both companies.
news.summary:
L&T Technology Services partners with Palfinger to establish a Global Development Center.
The GDC aims to accelerate product development processes for both companies.
